heading: Grants for SBDCs
label: 648b Grants for SBDCs
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Small Business Jobs Act of 2010, and not as part of the Small Business Act which comprises this chapter.
DefinitionsFor definition of “Administrator” and “small business concern” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 1001 of Pub. L. 111–240section 632 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Administrator may make grants to small business development centers under to provide targeted technical assistance to small business concerns seeking access to capital or credit, Federal procurement opportunities, energy efficiency audits to reduce energy bills, opportunities to export products or provide services to foreign customers, adopting, making innovations in, and using broadband technologies, or other assistance.section 648 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), and notwithstanding the requirements of , the amount appropriated to carry out this section shall be allocated under the formula under .section 648(a)(4)(C)(iii) of this titlesection 648(a)(4)(C)(i) of this title

children.heading: Minimum funding
children.label: 2 Minimum funding
children.text: The amount made available under this section to each State shall be not less than $325,000.

children.label: A
children.text: not less than 80 percent shall be used for counseling of small business concerns; and

children.label: B
children.text: not more than 20 percent may be used for classes or seminars.

children.heading: No non-Federal share required
children.label: c No non-Federal share required
children.text: Notwithstanding , the recipient of a grant made under this section shall not be required to provide non-Federal matching funds.section 648(a)(4)(A) of this title

children.heading: Distribution
children.label: d Distribution
children.text: Not later than 30 days after the date on which amounts are appropriated to carry out this section, the Administrator shall disburse the total amount appropriated.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: e Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Administrator $50,000,000 to carry out this section.
